capacity.reason: Prefer the highest observed average run-once throughput among zero-failure batches; at fixed-delay=60s this equals roughly the same steady-state tasks/minute per job.

retry.reason: Failure mode is usually invalid business precondition; manual trigger-now recovers in seconds, while automatic 120s avoids hot-looping invalid orders.
